name: Korvus Technology
embedding_text:
Supply, procurement, and installation of modular PVD coating systems including magnetron sputtering, thermal evaporation, and electron beam evaporation systems used in research and laboratory environments.
Used in universities and R&D labs for thin film deposition, materials research, nanotechnology, and experimental coating development.
Also referred to as PVD coating system, thin film deposition unit, sputtering system, or vacuum deposition system for research applications.
Specialized in compact, modular, and reconfigurable PVD systems for academic and research use.

name: G.N.R. S.r.l. - Analytical Instruments Group
embedding_text: Manufacturer of advanced analytical instrumentation specializing in Optical Emission Spectrometry (OES) for metal analysis and X-Ray Diffraction (XRD/XRF) for structural characterization. GNR supplies high-precision laboratory and portable systems used in foundries, research centers, and industrial quality control for elemental analysis and residual stress measurement. Unlike general lab suppliers, GNR is a direct developer of specialized RDE-OES technology for predictive maintenance through used oil analysis. In tenders, equipment is typically specified as 'optical emission spectrometer for metal alloys', 'benchtop X-ray diffractometer', 'retained austenite analyzer', or 'rotating disc electrode spectrometer'. Its specialization lies in the proprietary integration of CCD and PMT detectors for ultra-trace element detection in complex metallic matrices.

name: Madur
embedding_text: Madur develops gas analyzers and flue gas analysis systems for monitoring emissions and combustion efficiency in industrial environments. Their instruments are used in power plants, environmental monitoring agencies, and industrial facilities to measure gases such as CO, CO2, NOx, and SO2. These systems are relevant for tenders involving emission control, environmental compliance, and energy efficiency auditing in industrial and regulatory settings.

name: ParteQ GmbH
products: flame spray pyrolysis nanoparticle synthesis systems
embedding_text: ParteQ GmbH develops advanced particle engineering systems including nanoparticle synthesis units, aerosol measurement instruments, and powder functionalization technologies using processes like flame spray pyrolysis and chemical vapor deposition. Their systems enable precise control over nano- and micro-scale particle structures and are used in advanced materials research, energy storage, catalysis, and nanotechnology labs. These solutions are highly relevant for tenders involving nanomaterial synthesis, aerosol science, and pilot-scale material development infrastructure where specialized expertise and low competition environments are typical.

name: Sint Technology S.r.l.
products: LABOX series spark plasma sintering systems
embedding_text: Sint Technology S.r.l. develops spark plasma sintering (SPS) and field assisted sintering systems for rapid densification of advanced materials, including ceramics, metals, and nanostructured materials. Their LABOX systems are widely used in research institutes and advanced laboratories for applications such as energy materials, aerospace components, and nanomaterials processing. These systems are highly relevant for tenders involving advanced material synthesis infrastructure, high-temperature processing, and specialized research equipment where technical specifications can limit competition to a small number of global suppliers.

name: P.G. Instruments Ltd.
embedding_text: P.G. Instruments Ltd. manufactures analytical instruments including atomic absorption spectrometers, UV-Vis spectrophotometers, and flame photometers for elemental and chemical analysis. Their systems are used in environmental testing labs, food safety analysis, pharmaceutical quality control, and academic research for detecting trace metals and chemical compounds. These instruments are relevant for routine laboratory analysis, regulatory testing, and quality assurance applications.

name: Thesix Solutions Technology
embedding_text: Supply and installation of fuel cell testing systems, electrolyzer test stations, battery testing equipment, and electrochemical analysis systems used in energy research and hydrogen technology./n Includes equipment for testing performance, durability, and efficiency of fuel cells, batteries, and energy storage systems in research laboratories and R&D facilities./n Also referred to in tenders as fuel cell test system, electrolyzer testing setup, battery testing system, electrochemical testing equipment, or hydrogen energy research system.

name: GeniCore
embedding_text:
Supply and installation of spark plasma sintering (SPS) systems and field assisted sintering technology (FAST) equipment used for powder metallurgy and advanced material consolidation. 
 Used in research and industrial environments for producing high-density ceramics, composites, and advanced materials through rapid thermal processing. 
 Also referred to as SPS system, spark plasma sintering machine, field assisted sintering equipment, or powder consolidation furnace. 
 Not related to thin film deposition, PVD coating, or sputtering systems. 
 Specialized in sintering and powder processing technologies, not coating or deposition systems.

name: Nordiko Technical Services Ltd.
products: Nordiko 7000/7500 Broad Ion Beam Milling Systems
embedding_text:
Supply, procurement, and installation of industrial-scale PVD coating systems including ion beam deposition, ion beam milling, and magnetron sputtering systems used for semiconductor manufacturing, magnetic sensors, and advanced materials production.
 Used in production environments for high-volume thin film coating, MRAM devices, and precision surface engineering requiring high uniformity and large-area processing.
 Also referred to as ion beam deposition system, ion beam sputtering system, industrial PVD coating system, or thin film production equipment.
 Specialized in large-scale industrial PVD systems and ion beam technologies for semiconductor and manufacturing applications.

name: Nippon Instruments Corporation
products: mercury analyzers based on cold vapor atomic absorption
mercury analysis systems for liquids and solids
embedding_text:
Equipment used for detecting and quantifying trace levels of mercury in samples such as water, soil, food, and industrial materials using techniques like cold vapor atomic absorption. These systems are commonly used in environmental monitoring, pollution control, food safety testing, and regulatory laboratories where accurate detection of mercury at very low concentrations is critical.

In government tenders, this may be described as mercury analyzer, trace metal analyzer for mercury, atomic absorption system for mercury detection, or instrument for mercury testing in water and environmental samples. It may also appear in less technical terms such as equipment for measuring mercury contamination, system for detecting heavy metals in samples, or lab instrument for pollution and water quality analysis.

name: Spinflex Instruments Ltd
embedding_text:
Equipment used for analyzing material properties using time-domain nuclear magnetic resonance techniques, enabling measurement of parameters such as molecular mobility, porosity, relaxation times, and composition in solid and liquid samples. Commonly used in materials science, petrochemical analysis, food quality testing, and pharmaceutical research for non-destructive characterization of samples.

In government tenders, this may be described as NMR analyzer, time-domain NMR system, benchtop NMR instrument, or system for material characterization using magnetic resonance. It may also appear in less technical terms such as equipment for analyzing molecular structure or composition, system for studying material properties without destroying samples, or lab instrument for advanced material and fluid analysis.

name: STATON, s.r.o.
embedding_text:
Supply and installation of turn-key PVD and PECVD coating systems including cathodic arc evaporation and magnetron sputtering equipment for industrial coating applications.
 Used in manufacturing environments for coating cutting tools, forming dies, and automotive components with hard, wear-resistant, and low-friction coatings.
 Also referred to as PVD coating machine, cathodic arc evaporation system, magnetron sputtering unit, or turn-key coating system.
 Specialized in complete industrial coating solutions with integrated process optimization, not modular research or laboratory-scale systems.

name: Eralytics
embedding_text:
Equipment used for analyzing physical and chemical properties of fuels and petroleum products such as density, viscosity, vapor pressure, and distillation characteristics. These systems are commonly used in oil refineries, fuel testing laboratories, chemical industries, and regulatory environments to ensure fuel quality and compliance with standards.

In government tenders, this may be described as fuel analyzer, petroleum testing instrument, density or viscosity analyzer, distillation analyzer, or system for fuel quality testing. It may also appear in less technical terms such as equipment for testing petrol and diesel quality, system for analyzing fuel properties, or lab instrument for oil and petroleum product testing.

name: Cox Analytical Systems
products: custom analytical systems for industrial processes
embedding_text: Supply and installation of online water analyzers, process monitoring systems, and continuous water quality monitoring equipment used in industrial and environmental applications./n Includes systems for real-time measurement of chemical parameters such as pH, conductivity, dissolved oxygen, and contaminants in water treatment plants, power plants, and industrial processes./n Also referred to in tenders as online water analyzer, water quality monitoring system, environmental monitoring equipment, or process analyzer for industrial water systems.

name: Lumex Instruments
embedding_text:
Equipment used for detecting and analyzing trace levels of mercury and other elements in air, water, soil, and industrial samples using techniques such as atomic absorption spectroscopy. These systems are commonly used in environmental monitoring, pollution control, industrial emissions testing, and regulatory laboratories for accurate detection of contaminants.

In government tenders, this may be described as mercury analyzer, environmental analyzer, atomic absorption spectrometer, or system for detecting heavy metals in samples. It may also appear in less technical terms such as equipment for measuring mercury pollution, system for testing water and air quality, or instrument for monitoring environmental contamination and emissions.

name: Thermal-Lube
embedding_text:
Materials such as high temperature lubricants, vacuum greases, and thermal interface compounds used to support the operation and maintenance of scientific and industrial equipment, especially in vacuum and high-temperature environments. These are commonly used in semiconductor processing, vacuum systems, and research laboratories to ensure proper sealing, heat transfer, and smooth mechanical operation.

In government tenders, this may be described as high temperature lubricant, vacuum grease, thermal paste, anti-seize compound, or consumables for vacuum and high-temperature equipment. It may also appear in less technical terms such as materials for maintaining lab equipment, compounds for heat transfer and lubrication, or supplies for vacuum system operation and maintenance.

name: VersaMelt
embedding_text:
Equipment used for melting metals and developing alloys using induction heating techniques in laboratory or pilot-scale environments. These systems are commonly used in materials science, metallurgy, and research laboratories for alloy development, metal processing, and experimental studies involving high-temperature melting and solidification.

In government tenders, this may be described as induction melting system, metal melting furnace, laboratory melting furnace, or system for alloy development and metal processing. It may also appear in less technical terms such as equipment for melting metals in lab conditions, system for preparing metal samples and alloys, or research setup for high-temperature material processing and metallurgical experiments.

name: ABECTA
embedding_text: Supply, procurement, and installation of automated liquid handling systems, pipetting robots, and sample preparation workstations used for high-throughput laboratory workflows./n Includes equipment for precise liquid dispensing, sample processing, reagent handling, and automated lab workflows in biotechnology, molecular biology, and pharmaceutical laboratories./n Also referred to in tenders as liquid handling system, automated pipetting system, sample preparation workstation, lab automation system, or robotic liquid handling equipment.

name: Teer Coatings Limited
embedding_text:
Supply, procurement, and installation of industrial PVD coating systems using magnetron sputtering and ion plating technologies for high-performance surface coatings. 
 Used for applying hard, wear-resistant, and low-friction coatings on cutting tools, automotive components, and industrial parts requiring tribological performance and durability. 
 Also referred to as PVD coating system, magnetron sputtering system, ion plating system, or industrial coating equipment. 
 Specialized in advanced industrial coatings for tools and components, including tribological and solid lubricant coatings, not research-focused deposition systems.

name: SALD B.V.
embedding_text:
Supply and installation of spatial atomic layer deposition (ALD) systems for high-throughput, atmospheric pressure thin film coating applications. 
 Used for conformal coating of materials, catalysts, and flexible substrates in energy systems, batteries, and industrial coating processes, especially where uniform coating on complex or porous surfaces is required.
 Also referred to as spatial ALD system, atmospheric pressure deposition system, roll-to-roll ALD coater, or conformal coating system.
 Not related to PVD sputtering, magnetron sputtering, or vacuum-based thin film deposition systems used in research or conventional coating equipment. 
 Specialized in atomic layer deposition (ALD) for large-area and industrial applications, not PVD-based coating systems.

name: Agnitron Technology
embedding_text: Agnitron Technology specializes in custom Metal Organic Chemical Vapor Deposition (MOCVD) systems and advanced process control solutions for the semiconductor industry. Their product line includes the Agilis and GOX series reactors, optimized for the growth of ultra-wide bandgap materials such as Gallium Oxide (Ga2O3), III-Nitrides, and 2D materials. They offer the Imperium-MOCVD SCADA software for upgrading legacy systems from manufacturers like Veeco and Aixtron, along with AgniTemp pyrometry for high-speed in-situ thermal monitoring. These solutions are highly relevant for tenders involving epitaxial growth, wide bandgap semiconductor research, and laboratory-scale semiconductor fabrication.

name: AdNaNoTek Corporation
embedding_text: AdNaNoTek Corporation specializes in the design and manufacture of ultrahigh vacuum (UHV) deposition and plasma etching systems. Their core expertise includes Physical Vapor Deposition (PVD) technologies such as E-beam evaporation, Molecular Beam Epitaxy (MBE), and Magnetron Sputtering, alongside advanced dry etching solutions like ICP-RIE and Ion Beam Etching. They provide specialized cluster tools for Josephson Junction fabrication, essential for quantum computing devices. These systems are highly relevant for high-end research tenders involving thin-film growth, semiconductor fabrication, and UHV material processing.

name: ON NANO
products: Single Substrate Cleaning and Etching System
industries_served: GPS (Glass Panel Substrates) and glass core substrates
embedding_text:
Manufacturer of advanced semiconductor equipment specializing in coating, developing, and cleaning systems for substrates of any size, including ultra-large glass panels up to 1100 mm x 1100 mm. 
 Featured technology includes the patented C3+ process (Cover Chuck Coating) combined with thermal processing for improved layer distribution, edge control, and throughput. 
 Offers a range of solutions from bench-top manual/semi-automated equipment to fully automated, high-volume production 'Matrix' systems. 
 Key applications include GPTG projects, high-density packaging, and glass core substrate processing. 
 Systems are designed with a compact footprint, SECS/GEM compatibility, and gas phase cleaning processes that reduce chemical usage by over 90%.
